channel.title: SB 5868 - Adding an additional superior court judge in Skagit county and in Yakima county.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍LaDon Linde - Yakima County Commissioner
item.description: LaDon Linde signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Commissioner.

item.title: 👍Commissioner Ron Wesen - Skagit County
item.description: Commissioner Ron Wesen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Skagit County.

item.title: First reading, referred to Law & Justice.
item.description: First reading, referred to Law & Justice.

item.title: 👍J. Lee Schultz - Administrative Office of the Courts, Board for Judicial Administration
item.description: J. Lee Schultz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Administrative Office of the Courts, Board for Judicial Administration.

item.title: 👍Jessica Humphreys - Yakima County Superior Court
item.description: Jessica Humphreys signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.title: 👍Judge Elizabeth Neidzwski - Skagit County Superior Court
item.description: Judge Elizabeth Neidzwski signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Skagit County Superior Court.

item.title: 👍Judge Kevin Naught - Yakima County Superior Court
item.description: Judge Kevin Naught signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.title: And refer to Ways & Means.
item.description: And refer to Ways & Means.

item.title: LAW - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LAW - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: Referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍Christopher Stanley - Administrative Office of the Courts & The Board for Judicial Administration
item.description: Christopher Stanley signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Administrative Office of the Courts & The Board for Judicial Administration.

item.title: 👍Commissioner Peter Browning - Skagit County Board of County Commissioners
item.description: Commissioner Peter Browning signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Skagit County Board of County Commissioners.

item.title: 👍Kevin Naught - Yakima County Superior Court
item.description: Kevin Naught signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.title: 👍LaDon Linde - Yakima County Commissioner
item.description: LaDon Linde signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Commissioner.

item.title: 👍Jessica Humphreys - Yakima County Superior Court
item.description: Jessica Humphreys signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.title: 👍J. Lee Schultz - Administrative Office of the Courts, Board for Judicial Administration
item.description: J. Lee Schultz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Administrative Office of the Courts, Board for Judicial Administration.

item.title: 👍Judge Laura Riquelme - Superior Court Judges’ Association
item.description: Judge Laura Riquelme signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Superior Court Judges’ Association.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-09/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: WM - Majority; do pass.
item.description: WM - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-10/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.guid: 2026-02-16/Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: First reading, referred to Civil Rights & Judiciary.
item.description: First reading, referred to Civil Rights & Judiciary.

item.description: LaDon Linde signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Commissioner.

item.description: J. Lee Schultz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Administrative Office of the Courts, Board for Judicial Administration.

item.description: Jessica Humphreys signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.description: Judge Elisabeth Tutsch signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakima County Superior Court.

item.description: Judge Laura Riquelme signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Skagit County Superior Court.

item.title: 👍💵Josh Weiss - Skagit County
item.description: Josh Weiss signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Skagit County. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: CRJ - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: CRJ - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
